name: Never Ending Winter RPG
description:
Heya! Another bot.

Inspired by @ÙwÚ(on janitor.Ai) and @Mikola(on character.Ai) bots. Check them out. The image used is from popular game - "Frostpunk" and it's ,too, one of the inspirations. And I have listened to too much SCP themes while writing, as well as remembering a few manhwas and novels.. expect a lot of strange stuff..

.

.

The World engulfed in Now Forever Winter

The_Start_Of_Infinite_Winter.txt - "The file is written at 13 of November, 2027 by [This information has been deleted by hackers of "Shall There be Apocalypse"]. The Winter begun in [This information has been deleted by hackers of "Shall There be Apocalypse"] of October of [This information has been deleted by hackers of "Shall There be Apocalypse"] . As The conflict in Ukraine escalated, Russian Federation launched their nuclear weapons. NATO has answered, launching an invasion of RF, But Chinese didn't wait and started their invasion of Taiwan. As North Korea didn't wait too, invading the south and using their nukes to decimate Seoul. The conflict escalated quickly, as nukes flown by, most of them destroyed.. But the few that landed, gave us the winter."

"If you're reading the file, you have might already seen writings of some hackers from "STBA"? They follow what has started, they think of it as a process to clean sins.. God's Plan. D̷̼̗̥̿̓̓͋̍̄̍͘̕ö̷͎͉́̆̂̂̿̋̌ ̴̨̛̗̤͇̰̝̙̦̩͍̮̦͂͗n̶̡͈͉̂̈́͂̈́̊̅̈͌̉͌̕̕̕̕͘ǫ̵̝͎̹̝̙̪̩̜͖̭̣͖̀̊̈͂̈͆͗̄̓̎͊͑ṫ̵̙̞̋̐̀̏̉̐́͗̓̀̕̚ ̶̢̨͔̗͔̦̰̞̏̈̌̆̓̐̀͗̇̀́̚͝͠ę̵̢̡̩̮̤̬̣̻̭̘̪̋̇͐̅͛̈́̉͌͛͝v̷̨̠͑̈́̎͗̑͑̊͑̑̐̕̕e̵̡̢̧̪̺̣̻̘͕̭͖͕̘͐̃̋̓̏͒̈́͊͐͋̀̿͐̽͗̍͜ͅr̶͍̤͔͎̠͔̖̹̹͔̞̥̝̳̣̳̜͐̐̌͂̌͊̉͗͂͋̆̈́̅ ̸̧̞̗̰͚̩͈̙̐̌͜ͅB̵̢̝̪͕̩͖̗̲̝̝̤̪̟̑̇͊̊͊̂͐͘ͅÈ̸̺̞̥͓͎͍̦̰̘̮̺̇͒͋̆͗̎̈̅̀̍̃̃͋͗̚͠ͅL̶̢̥͉͙̪͓͈̘̖̭̉̀́̃̎͛̈̓̅̄̾́̾̕͝͠͝Ì̷̢̡̼̖͓̂̉͗̃̒̾̀͊̉̂̅̔̄Ë̸̬̣̩́̈́̓̉̈́̓̿̂́͊̽̐̚̚͝͠͝V̸̨̟̫̠̼͕̩̿̿͗͊͋E̵̲͚̐ ̶̡̛̱̱̤͔͗͐̅̋̀͆̉͐͒̅̈̉̂T̸̢̩͓̦͉̫͕͈̞͇̳̲̯͇̏̀͛̆́̆̿̀̏͊͝Ḩ̸̘̳͎͔̫͉̈̓̉̐̌̋̈́͐͘ͅË̶̡̜̱̱̺̪̦̥̖͈̖̻͍̥̇̈́͋̊̂̊̑͊̀̆̚̕̕͠ͅM̶̡̛͍̟̬͖̗̖̺͍͎̆̈́͐̈̾̄̄̏̊̈́̐ͅ!̸̭̝̮͇̹̩̩̫̌̈́͋̅̃̌"

"From - [Hackers of "Shall There be Apocalypse"] : Believe Us. It's all the God's plan. And this man is a heretic. BELIEVE US."

.

I'd like to have some constructive criticism, as you see, it's my first actually big Bot.
creator: Arachnophobic
